Title: Mixed Cart — unselect ALL line items with shipment selected: does backend zero the cart totals (shipping + tax + total)?
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER on B2B-store (loyalty mode Mixed Cart, loyalty currency PTS). Builds a genuine mixed-currency cart: a USD primary line + a PTS loyalty line (same buyable product re-added with itemCurrencyCode=PTS — xAPI splits it into a distinct PTS line, verified live via 050b4 GQL-MC-*). Selects a discovered fixed-rate shipping method (price matched to the available rate so CartShipmentValidator accepts). Then unselects BOTH line items (all items, selectedForCheckout=false) and reads totals. DECISIVE QUESTION: does DefaultShoppingCartTotalsCalculator zero everything (SubTotal gated by SelectedForCheckout, ShippingSubTotal/ShippingTotal NOT gated per source ~L95-106), or leave shipping+tax+total non-zero? Assertions encode the 'browser-claimed ZERO' hypothesis — a FAIL means the backend leaves shipping/tax/total non-zero (bug is BACKEND, not Apollo cache).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=discover_pts_product] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_usd_item] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_pts_item] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_pre] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_shipment] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_with_ship] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=unselect_usd] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=unselect_pts] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_unsel] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_pre] data.cart.items >= 2
[COUNT label=read_pre] data.cart.cartTotals = 2
[DATA label=read_with_ship] data.cart.shippingTotal.amount > 0
[DATA label=read_with_ship] data.cart.total.amount > 0
[DATA label=read_with_ship] data.cart.shipments.0.price.amount > 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.items[?id={{USD_LINE_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = false
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.items[?id={{PTS_LINE_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = false
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.subTotal.amount = 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.taxTotal.amount = 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.shippingTotal.amount = 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.shippingPrice.amount = 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.total.amount = 0
[DATA label=read_unsel] data.cart.cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=false].total.amount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Decisive backend ground truth — no Apollo cache in path. PRE: total/subTotal/tax/shipping captured before unselect. WITH_SHIP: shipping folded into total. UNSEL: all five flat money fields + PTS bucket dumped via captures regardless of pass/fail. A FAIL on the shipping/total=0 lines means the backend (DefaultShoppingCartTotalsCalculator) leaves shipping+tax+total non-zero after unselect-all -> the stale UI total is BACKEND, not frontend/Apollo cache.
Failure_Signals: add_shipment errors[] non-empty (rate mismatch — check SHIP_PRICE capture); shippingTotal/total != 0 after unselect-all (backend leaves shipping in totals); itemsCount drops to 0 (items removed not just unselected); cartTotals collapses to 1 bucket
Cleanup: none — cleanup_post clears the default cart inline in Steps
References: VCST-5101; reports/bugs/open/BUG-xcart-clearvalidationcache-empties-lineitem-validationerrors-on-mutations.md; DefaultShoppingCartTotalsCalculator.cs L81-106,156; mirrors 050b4 GQL-MC-010 mixed-cart pattern
